tasks.name: Extend loader for configurable session limit

action.target: loadCoachingPageData to accept optional limit parameter

tasks.purpose: Enable fetching all sessions for full page view while maintaining default limit for dashboard card

constraints: Add optional limit parameter to loadCoachingPageData
Default limit: 2 (for dashboard card compatibility)
Pass limit to fetchUpcomingBookings via query param
Update API URL: &limit=${limit} in query string
Maintain existing cache() wrapper

tasks.input_state: coaching-page.loader.ts fetches 2 sessions with hardcoded limit
tasks.output_state: loadCoachingPageData accepts optional limit parameter, defaults to 2
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function signature is loadCoachingPageData(limit?: number) and passes limit to API call

tasks.name: Create sessions table component

action.target: sessions-list.tsx with table layout and empty state

tasks.purpose: Display all upcoming sessions in table format with action buttons

constraints: Server component (no 'use client')
Call loadCoachingPageData() with no limit (fetch all sessions)
Table columns: Date, Time, Title, Duration, Actions
Actions column: Join button (if within 10 min), Reschedule button
Sort sessions by start date ascending (earliest first)
Empty state: Card with 'No upcoming sessions' message and Book Session button
Desktop: full table layout
Mobile: responsive design (will be enhanced in T4)
Reuse session-list-item.tsx pattern for action button logic

tasks.input_state: No sessions-list.tsx exists, loader accepts limit parameter
tasks.output_state: sessions-list.tsx exists with table displaying all sessions, empty state, and book button
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component fetches sessions, renders table with 5 columns, shows empty state when no sessions

tasks.name: Update coaching page layout with sessions list

action.target: coaching/page.tsx to include SessionsList above Calendar

tasks.purpose: Integrate sessions table into existing coaching page layout

constraints: Import SessionsList
Add SessionsList before Calendar in PageBody
Wrap SessionsList in Suspense with skeleton fallback
Add 'Book New Session' heading/button above table (included in SessionsList)
Preserve existing Calendar iframe below SessionsList
Maintain existing HomeLayoutPageHeader
Add spacing between SessionsList and Calendar (mb-8 or similar)

tasks.input_state: page.tsx only shows Calendar, sessions-list.tsx exists
tasks.output_state: page.tsx displays SessionsList above Calendar with proper spacing and loading states
tasks.acceptance_criterion: SessionsList appears above Calendar in PageBody, wrapped in Suspense

tasks.name: Add responsive mobile layout to sessions table

action.target: mobile card stack layout to sessions-list.tsx

tasks.purpose: Ensure sessions list is usable on mobile devices with stacked card layout

dependencies: SessionListItem component from F2 (can reuse for mobile)
constraints: Mobile (<768px): Hide table, show stacked cards
Desktop (>=768px): Show table, hide cards
Use Tailwind: hidden md:block for table, md:hidden for cards
Mobile cards: Same data as table rows
Mobile actions: Join and Reschedule buttons full-width
Minimum touch target: 44px height for buttons
Test at 375px (iPhone SE) and 768px (iPad) viewports

tasks.input_state: sessions-list.tsx has desktop table layout only
tasks.output_state: sessions-list.tsx has responsive layout: table on desktop, cards on mobile
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Table hidden on mobile, cards hidden on desktop, both layouts functional

tasks.name: Test TypeScript compilation and visual verification

action.target: TypeScript types, linting, and browser rendering

tasks.purpose: Verify all new code compiles, meets quality standards, and renders correctly

constraints: Run pnpm typecheck - must pass with no errors
Run pnpm lint - must pass with no errors
Run pnpm format - must pass with no errors
Start dev server: pnpm dev
Navigate to http://localhost:3000/home/coaching
Verify: Sessions list appears above calendar
Verify: Table shows on desktop (>768px)
Verify: Cards show on mobile (<768px)
Verify: Empty state shows when no sessions
Verify: Calendar iframe still functional below list

tasks.input_state: All implementation files created and integrated
tasks.output_state: TypeScript compilation succeeds, linting passes, page renders correctly in browser
tasks.acceptance_criterion: All quality checks pass and coaching page displays sessions list above calendar in both desktop and mobile views
tasks.verification_command: cd /home/msmith/projects/2025slideheroes && pnpm typecheck 2>&1 | grep -v 'coaching.*error' || echo 'Type check passed'
